name: watchlist
description: Watchlist app — one link for everyone, shared data

scripts.build: cd client && npm ci && npm run build && cd ../server && npm ci
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.dev:client: cd client && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.dev:client:3002: cd client && npm install && cross-env VITE_API_PROXY_PORT=3002 npm run dev
scripts.dev:split: concurrently -k -n api,vite -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.dev:split:3002: concurrently -k -n api,vite -c cyan,magenta "cross-env PORT=3002 npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:client:3002"
